commands.name: $(check-all) Verify Quick
commands.tooltip: Run format check, guardrails, lint, typecheck and fast tests for the current workspace

commands.name: $(beaker) Verify All
commands.tooltip: Run the full workspace verification including coverage tests and build

commands.name: $(tools) Run Task
commands.tooltip: Open the VS Code Run Task picker

commands.name: $(browser) Dashboards
commands.tooltip: Web (10001) + Grafana (10008) im integrierten Simple Browser öffnen

commands.name: $(git-merge) Merge hfts-dev1 → main
commands.tooltip: Checkout main, pull latest, and merge hfts-dev1 locally (no push)
commands.command: git checkout main && git pull && git merge hfts-dev1
